evals.prompt: Set up Agent Orchestrator on this machine. Detect installed harnesses and local models, but ask before writing config.yaml or running smoke tests.
evals.expected_output: Uses orchestrator-init, runs passive detection, writes inventory automatically, asks before smoke tests and config writes, and never stores secret values.

evals.prompt: Delegate this task: refactor code using production customer logs. I have local Ollama and OpenCode configured.
evals.expected_output: Uses orchestrator-delegate, treats the task as sensitive, prefers local/private routes, and asks before external APIs or file edits.

evals.prompt: Run a swarm where different AIs validate this architecture plan and bring conclusions.
evals.expected_output: Uses orchestrator-swarm, requires at least two distinct routes, presents a concise confirmation plan before dispatch, and uses a review-council or specialist scorecard.

evals.prompt: Have multiple agents solve this bug in separate worktrees and compare the commits.
evals.expected_output: Uses orchestrator-swarm worktree_competition mode, creates controller-owned worktrees under ~/.cache/ai-orchestrator/worktrees, requires each route to commit, and does not apply a winner without confirmation.
